note: Improved initial 1280x720 live-frame calibration, June 17 2026. Zone numbering is from the live camera image perspective, not the architectural top-down room diagram: Zone 1 bottom-left/camera-side, Zone 2 middle-right/lower-mid, Zone 3 left/mid working area, Zone 4 top-right, Zone 5 upper-middle, Zone 6 top-left. This remains approximate and must be replaced by supervised live click calibration before Auto is trusted.
